semantic.role: Defines the project identity, module structure, and provenance metadata for the ArchSpine semantic indexing system.
responsibilities: Module directory layout and role assignment
Provenance tracking for indexing pipeline stages
invariants: schemaVersion must be a valid semver string
projectName must match the repository root identifier
provenance.indexedAt must be a valid ISO 8601 timestamp
pipelineStages must contain at least one stage

English.role: Defines the project identity, module structure, and provenance metadata for the ArchSpine semantic indexing system.

parameter_definitions.schemaVersion: Controls compatibility with ArchSpine tooling; mismatched versions may cause parsing failures.
parameter_definitions.projectName: Identifies the repository for cross-reference integrity; must match the root project name.
parameter_definitions.modules: Declares source and documentation directories with their roles and file counts; affects indexing scope.
parameter_definitions.provenance.indexedAt: Timestamp of last indexing; used for cache invalidation and staleness detection.
parameter_definitions.provenance.generatorVersion: Version of the indexing tool that produced this file; critical for reproducibility.
parameter_definitions.provenance.pipelineStages: Ordered list of processing stages (e.g., AST, LLM) that generated the index; affects downstream tool behavior.

English.stability_and_risks: This file is the root configuration for the ArchSpine indexing pipeline. Incorrect schemaVersion or projectName can break cross-repository linking and toolchain compatibility. Missing or stale provenance timestamps may cause unnecessary re-indexing or missed updates. The module list defines the scope of semantic analysis; omitting directories can lead to incomplete knowledge graphs.

Simplified Chinese.role: 定义 ArchSpine 语义索引系统的项目标识、模块结构和溯源元数据。

parameter_definitions.schemaVersion: 控制与 ArchSpine 工具的兼容性；版本不匹配可能导致解析失败。
parameter_definitions.projectName: 标识仓库以保持交叉引用完整性；必须与根项目名称一致。
parameter_definitions.modules: 声明源代码和文档目录及其角色和文件数量；影响索引范围。
parameter_definitions.provenance.indexedAt: 上次索引的时间戳；用于缓存失效和过时检测。
parameter_definitions.provenance.generatorVersion: 生成此文件的索引工具版本；对可重现性至关重要。
parameter_definitions.provenance.pipelineStages: 生成索引的处理阶段有序列表（例如 AST、LLM）；影响下游工具行为。

Simplified Chinese.stability_and_risks: 此文件是 ArchSpine 索引管道的根配置。错误的 schemaVersion 或 projectName 可能破坏跨仓库链接和工具链兼容性。缺失或过时的溯源时间戳可能导致不必要的重新索引或遗漏更新。模块列表定义了语义分析的范围；遗漏目录会导致知识图谱不完整。
